title: Your Name
section: Research and engineering for real imaging systems
text:
Research and engineering for real imaging systems
I am a research and development engineer focused on image sensors, AI-based signal processing, and computational imaging. My work centers on turning imaging constraints into robust algorithms for practical systems, from RAW image processing and defect correction to efficient neural processing on constrained devices.

title: Your Name
text:
Focus Areas


Image sensor R&D
Signal processing for emerging sensor functions and practical camera pipelines.


AI-based signal processing
Learning-based methods for image quality, robustness, and efficient deployment.


Computational imaging
Algorithms that combine optics, sensing, reconstruction, and downstream perception.


Practical imaging systems
Development experience across algorithm design, constraints, validation, and delivery.


Kaggle Competitions Master
Applied machine learning experience in competitive, measurable problem settings.


Community activity
SSII Takagi Award and MIRU 2026 corporate relations / sponsorship committee activity.
